options.name: KEEP_CURRENT_MONITOR
options.benefit: Zero disruption. Model still works during deprecated phase. Buys time for testing replacement.
options.risk: Model WILL fail on 2026-06-15. If not migrated by then, all Anthropic-dependent operations break.
options.cost_impact: NONE ($0.00 now, potential cost of emergency migration later)
options.quality_impact: NONE (model still functional during deprecated phase, may be less reliable per Anthropic warning)
options.required_t1_action: Set calendar reminder for 2026-06-01 to force migration decision.
options.recommended_if: T1 wants to test replacement model before committing.

options.name: MIGRATE_TO_NEW_ANTHROPIC_MODEL
options.benefit: Stays within Anthropic ecosystem. Official replacement (claude-sonnet-4-6) is newer, better, active until 2027-02-17.
options.risk: Requires T1 to approve model change. May have different behavior/pricing. Needs testing.
options.cost_impact: LOW (same provider, similar pricing tier expected)
options.quality_impact: POSITIVE (newer model, 9 months of active support remaining)
options.required_t1_action: Approve model change from claude-sonnet-4-20250514 to claude-sonnet-4-6 in provider_registry.json.
options.implementation_scope: Update provider_registry.json model field. Update eol_overrides in migration guard. Run verification test.
options.rollback: Revert provider_registry.json to previous model (if still available before retirement).
options.recommended_if: T1 wants to stay with Anthropic and the official replacement is acceptable.
options.not_recommended_if: T1 wants to reduce Anthropic dependency or test alternatives first.

options.name: TEMPORARILY_REMOVE_ANTHROPIC_FROM_R0PLUS
options.benefit: Eliminates Anthropic risk entirely from R0+ operations. Zero dependency on deprecated model.
options.risk: Reduces available providers from 4 to 3. May limit fallback options if another provider fails.
options.cost_impact: NONE (R0+ currently uses $0.00 in provider calls)
options.quality_impact: NONE for R0+ (no provider calls are made). Would matter if R1 operations begin.
options.required_t1_action: Approve setting Anthropic status to SUSPENDED_PENDING_MIGRATION in registry.
options.implementation_scope: Update provider_registry.json status to SUSPENDED. No code logic changes needed (R0+ makes no provider calls).
options.rollback: Restore Anthropic status to ALLOWED with new model when ready.
options.recommended_if: T1 wants a clean risk profile while deciding on replacement.
options.not_recommended_if: T1 plans to use Anthropic in R1 operations soon.

options.name: REPLACE_WITH_EXISTING_ALLOWED_PROVIDER
options.benefit: Uses already-configured provider (OpenAI/Google/xAI) as primary. No new setup needed.
options.risk: Changes the default provider assumption. May affect future R1 quality if Anthropic was preferred.
options.cost_impact: VARIABLE (depends on chosen replacement provider pricing)
options.quality_impact: VARIABLE (depends on task type and chosen model capability)
options.required_t1_action: Approve which existing provider becomes the Anthropic replacement for R1 operations.
options.implementation_scope: Update provider priority/default in registry. Update any code that assumes Anthropic as default.
options.rollback: Restore Anthropic with new model when available.
options.recommended_if: T1 wants to move away from Anthropic entirely.
options.not_recommended_if: T1 prefers Anthropic quality and just needs to update the model version.

options.name: REQUIRE_EXTERNAL_VERIFICATION_BEFORE_DECISION
options.benefit: Maximum caution. Direct API test confirms model availability before any action.
options.risk: Delays decision. If model is already failing, delays response to outage.
options.cost_impact: MINIMAL (one API call to verify model responds)
options.required_t1_action: Authorize one diagnostic API call to Anthropic to verify model status.
options.implementation_scope: Single API call with minimal prompt. Record response. Decide based on result.
options.recommended_if: T1 wants absolute certainty before acting.
options.not_recommended_if: External source (endoflife.date) already confirms EOL — verification adds delay without new information.
